subject: Action needed: salmon planning in Tokyo | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-3645
body: Field notes now include drop bears as part of the broader push to control urban areas in Tokyo. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Albert Einstein and Marie Curie seem to be influential figures in this context. Reference initiative INIT-3645. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: quality, quality.
